title: ID CARD-GENDER DESIGNATION
summary: Amends the Illinois Identification Card Act and the Illinois Vehicle Code. Provides that the Secretary of State shall permit applicants to choose between "male", "female", or "X" (rather than "male", "female", or "non-binary") on an application for an identification card, driver's license, or permit. Provides that an applicant who wants to change the sex listed on an issued identification card, driver's license, or permit must submit a gender designation form. Sets forth the requirements of the gender designation form.

actions.action: Filed with the Clerk by Rep. Mary Beth Canty
Assigned to State Government Administration Committee
